title: DataRequest
description: An 'Ask IBO' data / analysis request — the one citizen-facing transaction IBO offers, and the NET-NEW write surface. IBO is a reference/analysis agency: unlike operational agencies it has no payment, permit, or application transaction. Its single interactive citizen input is 'Ask IBO' (www.ibo.nyc.gov/content/ask-ibo), where residents, journalists, and Council staff submit questions and data requests. Today that is a web form / email (info@ibo.nyc.gov) only — there is NO API and NO Open Data twin. This schema serves both the write surface (submit a request) and the read surface (list/get one's own requests).

requestId.description: Server-assigned request/ticket number. Omit on create; returned on the created resource.

status.description: Lifecycle status. Set by IBO, not the requester.

question.description: The data or analysis question being asked of IBO.

requesterType.description: Who is asking (helps IBO triage; reflects its statutory audiences).

relatedAgency.description: City agency or program the question concerns, if any.

preferredFormat.description: How the requester would like the answer delivered.

responseUrl.description: Link to a published answer or referenced IBO publication, when answered.
